creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 157520
failed build log

Hi,

While testing this patch I have been unable to make it work in all FreeBSD versions.

With the patch as is, with default options, it fails on 10.1 and head, I'm attaching a log of a failed build.

If I use USES=openmp it succeeds on 10.1 and head but fails on older releases.

Have noticed this behavior too? are you able to submit a patch without this problem?

Thanks in advance.
